textByHash.17b76c00e91343664ac19ad83760d5a7040079ab: I appreciate that you want to invest more, but I really don't need it right now!
textByHash.1ae36eabde98aa388b6d518d8aa437675fd90a21: Right, try to be a bit more careful this time; these birds take a long time to raise. I'd rather not lose one.
textByHash.1dc4f04339b99ab8a3abc177fd35d8ccd46de44c: Good, however you really need both hands free. I'd suggest that you put away your weapons and gloves before we start.
textByHash.3d68c4de9b6f4ccdd64f34574b5fbe79048c121e: Falcons aren't domesticated you know. You can't expect them to just automatically return to you. Fortunately for you, they can learn to associate areas with food. He'll probably be back on his post.
textByHash.405d7d48bf8c51cb806bbdd85bd35661bf31594e: A good question; straight and to the point.
textByHash.45091a5d5e849b41b5af92ba81c1fc1c2edcbb39: A quest? What a strange notion. Do you normally go around asking complete strangers for quests?
textByHash.5a8c5847da71cc4bcd7028ecf12f57fe0210de81: Well, you're welcome to come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.5b2561278c184b1ffe788dbf1396f99af4e4e315: Oh, ok then. Well, no, I don't; sorry.
textByHash.5f840609d40a0ddf12492edb44258f1b79a84f41: Ah, you're back. How are you getting along with him then?
textByHash.5fdd86d2e0e6cd9285fea87dd220f42e2a940c68: Well, some people see it as a sport, although such a term does not really convey the amount of patience and dedication required to be proficient at the task.
textByHash.67d77472a6f12909edbdada0a326a224c35c3773: They can be trained to associate people or places with food though, and, as such, a good falconer can get a trained bird to do as he wishes.
textByHash.6b39c1e3b658d92f0d22724d5d1c566aa675c220: Ah, you're back. How are you getting along with her then?
textByHash.6f58ce4b3ad919b41ca51260a1cccacdea2c42a7: My name is Matthias, I am a falconer, and this is where I train my birds.
textByHash.74118387f36b5bf503ca5c6c43ca053f0596c106: Training falcons is a lot of work and I doubt you're up to the task. However, I suppose I could let you try hunting with one.
textByHash.801ecdeca765bfd153ac4e59e5789368fcc03fc6: Sorry, but I was talking to the falcon, not you. But yes it is; have you had enough yet?
textByHash.83ddce142faba50d72d29501fe36d969abe611a7: Greetings. Can I help you at all?
textByHash.8b8c91bda277aef88ed36c53454a79c049e122f1: If you'd like to put money forward for training more falcons, be my guest!
textByHash.8e4d51c2b57af1ceb87a5dbd449aeee49c7d62dc: Good, however you really need both hands free. I'd suggest that you take off some of that kit you're wearing before we start.
textByHash.9f98412ec6be1262ec07e62f1cd65787ba2a43d0: Hmm, well it looks like you've got the hang of setting falcons on creatures. However, I suggest you keep track of it; left to its own devices it'll be more than happy to fly off on its own to find food.
textByHash.a0a27bc09ea861e16d43fc1f1a7d6e5252bf7732: Putting it simply, it is the training and use of birds of prey in hunting quarry.
textByHash.a2b9cb4ff37f260666e51879df967620e7703d19: I'd have to request a small fee, mind you; how does 500 gold pieces sound?
textByHash.b13002ef9764ca67819cfb5fc342400932569285: Fair enough; it does require a great deal of patience and skill, so I can understand if you might feel intimidated.
textByHash.be039c8fae77af2012409c0ad62d00884048a2fe: I have some tamer birds that I occasionally lend to rich noblemen who consider it a sufficiently refined sport for their tastes, and you look like the kind who might appreciate a good hunt.
textByHash.d4652c2b8df3333f66feecb4fcd4bd5ef96be50b: Not exactly, no. Such a bird can never really be considered tame in the same way that a dog can.
textByHash.dd76a0619007209105682add823ee64b533b9274: I suppose I could let you use my falcons for free if you stump up enough cash. How does 500,000 coins sound?
textByHash.e1d20b4f49c81d87420be0f7dea4906771cd338d: Don't worry; I'll keep an eye on you to make sure you don't upset it too much.
textByHash.e5686841f4b2222d998e09fdd3a9de9bc7d3a8af: Do you want me to fetch him for you?
textByHash.e67652816e867f793a0c5da5d852bd1301ec4177: Ah, you're back. How are you getting along with them then?
